name: Garlic Baby Bok Choy
description: Quick high-heat stir-fried baby bok choy with garlic — crisp-tender and glistening.
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb baby bok choy, halved or quartered
recipeInstructions: Wash the bok choy thoroughly and drain. Heat oil in a wok over high heat and fry the garlic until fragrant.
Add the bok choy and stir-fry over high heat, scooping to coat in the garlicky oil.
Season with salt, sesame oil, and white pepper; stir-fry 1-2 minutes until just tender. Finish with a touch of cornstarch slurry for gloss if you like.
author: The Woks of Life
